titleStmt.title: SII 23.429: original edition by G.V. Srinivasa Rao
No. 429. (A.R. No. 429 of 1907.) Śiṉṉamaṉūr, Periyakulam Taluk, Madurai District Rājasiṁhēśvara temple—on the same wall Māṟ. Kulaśēkhara I: year 41: 1308-09 A.D.

summary.p: The inscription is mutilated. It refers to the 10th year of Sundara-Pāṇḍyadēva. It seems to register a gift of some impost on articles sold by them in the bazaars at Arikēsarinallūr and at Śīvallavan-Paḍaivīḍu for meeting the expenses of worship and festival in Mārgaḻi month in the temple of Rājaśiṅgēśuramuḍaiya-Nāyiṉār, by the (mercantile) bodies Padiṉeṇvishayattār, the Seṭṭis of Chōṇāḍu and others.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī . komāṟapaṉmarāṉa tribhu[ vaṉaccakravattikaḷ] Emmaṇṭalamuṅ koṇṭaruḷiya kulaicekaratevaṟku yāṇṭu 4 10 1vatu Āṉi mācam patiṉaiñcām tiyati Uṭaiyār Irācciṅkecuramuṭaiya nāyiṉāṟku tiru mārka
ṣayattomum patiṉeṭṭu maṇṭalattil patiṉeṇviṣayattomum tiruc coṇāṭṭuc ceṭṭikaḷ taḷacceṭṭikaḷomum Iṉṉāyiṉār koyi lil maṇṭapattil niṟaivaṟa niṟaintu ku
laiyarirappukku vaittukkuṭutta paṭṭaṇappakuti yāvatu Arikecarinallūṟ paṇṭacālaiyilum civallavaṉ paṭaiviṭṭil paṇṭacālaiyilum parimā ṟum nū
ḷukuṟavaṉpeṟkup paṇamoṉṟukku muntirikai ṉāṭi kuṭukkuṟavaṉ peṟku muntirikaiyum śrīsundarapāṇḍyadevaṟkup pattāvatu Āvaṇi mātam pattān tiyati I
Digital edition of SII 23.429 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
